package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for template_parse_in_handler: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Template construction or parsing inside Gin handlers instead of startup-time caching.
type CaseTemplateParseInHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTemplateParseInHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTemplateParseInHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTemplateParseInHandlerModel
}

type CaseTemplateParseInHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseTemplateParseInHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTemplateParseInHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeTemplateParseInHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTemplateParseInHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "template_parse_in_handler"
    _ = focus
    templateCache := map[string]string{"page": "parsed at startup"}
    _ = templateCache
    template_parse_handler_negative := map[string]int{"template": 1, "parse": 2, "handler": 3}
    template_parse_handler_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    template_negative_0 := template_parse_handler_negative["template"] + len(input)
    _ = template_negative_0
    parse_negative_1 := template_parse_handler_negative["parse"] + len(input)
    _ = parse_negative_1
    handler_negative_2 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_2
    return nil
}
